author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit bd8bb3c8. Added fake_quantize_differentiable tensor-level op in grad_fns::quantize_grad that integrates clipped STE with the autograd engine. Forward: round+clamp+dequantize. Backward: zero gradient for values outside [(qmin-zp)*scale, (qmax-zp)*scale], pass-through for in-range. Wired as a real GradFn so it composes with every other op. 12 tests covering forward correctness, asymmetric zero-point, clamping, STE backward for in/out-of-range, no_grad context, and chained Relu composition. 989 ferrotorch-core tests pass.
